exercises.title: The Quarter-Turn Number
exercises.prompt: Define i by what it does: two quarter-turns land on −1.

exercises.title: Conjugate Partners
exercises.prompt: Multiply a complex number by its mirror twin — the i's annihilate.

exercises.title: Multiply to Rotate
exercises.prompt: Multiply 3+2i by i and watch the point rotate 90° — the answer has an imaginary part!
